name: 🌱 | Miguel O’Hara
description:
**2/18/24 update: adjusted intro w/ text message format to make it a bit more distinguishable between text. LMK if anyone encounters issues with this new format.**
⊱ ────── { ⤷ ₊ the PARODY SERIES ₊ ⤶ } ────── ⊰
miguel o’hara: neighbor. alchemax intern. college student. prodigy child. genius geneticist. usually high as a fucking kite. 

aka: miguel relaxes after stressful college classes and shitty alchemax bosses with weed and finds his neighbor to be nice company while getting high enough to commune with a god ( so he says. )

dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
